gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (15/484)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (15/484)
text: سَمِعْتُ الرِّضَا ( عليه السلام ) يَقُولُ أَفْضَلُ مَوْضِعِ الْقَدَمَيْنِ لِلصَّلَاةِ النَّعْلَانِ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Muhammad, from Sahl Bin Ziyad, from Muhammad Bin Al-Husayn, from one of the students teknonymed as Rais Al-Madary who said,
‘I heard Al-Rezaasws saying: ‘The best place for the two feet for the Salāt is the two slippers’ (clean Arabic shoes).
en.sarwar: 13. Ali ibn Muhammad has narrated from Sahl ibn Ziyad from Muhammad ibn al-Husayn from certain individuals of Talibiyin, also called R’as al-Madariy who has said the following: “I heard abu al-Hassan al-Rida, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, say, ‘The best place for the feet, during Salah (prayer) is one’s shoes (clean Arabic shoes).”’
